5.3.2.2 LogSoftMax Tiling
Function Description
To perform LogSoftMax computation in the kernel, developers need to reserve or
allocate the temporary space. The LogSoftMaxTilingFunc API is used to obtain
the maximum and minimum sizes of the temporary space to be reserved or
allocated on the host. Developers can also call LogSoftMaxTilingFunc to obtain
parameters such as reduceSize and splitSize and pass them as the tiling
parameters to the k...
